summary: Video. A Fox & Friends morning-show interview with Stephen Miller responding to Biden's address to Congress, shown as a multi-box live panel with Fox chyrons listing 'top takeaways.' It is a recorded cable-news interview segment. It is tagged as advertisement; it is a news and TV clip.
notable_text: Fox chyrons: 'TOP TAKEAWAYS FROM BIDEN'S ADDRESS TO CONGRESS'; 'BIDEN TALKS IMMIGRATION REFORM, OMITS BORDER SURGE'; 'SEN SCOTT CALLS OUT BIDEN OVER PLEDGE FOR UNITY'; FOX & FRIENDS
